title: Chapter 2116: Celestial Doctor(2)
content:
Chapter 2116: Celestial Doctor(2)

"Internal struggle... that’s putting it lightly," the Celestial Doctor said, shaking her head. "The Celestial Overlords quickly went to shit after you disappeared. It’d gotten so bad that I decided to leave."

"Now that you’ve returned, are you going to take control again? Otherwise, I don’t see myself ever returning."

"We’ll see how things go. The Celestial Overlords is a thing of the past, so I don’t really have much attachment to it, especially since I don’t have most of Tian Yingzhe’s memories. However, that might change when I recover his memories."

"Is that so? I guess I’ll remain as a wandering doctor for a little longer then."

The Celestial Doctor retrieved a jade slip before casually tossing it into the air toward Yuan, who quickly caught it.

"You can use that to communicate with me directly. If you ever need my help, don’t hesitate to call," she said. "I don’t want to brag, but as the Celestial Doctor, I’m one of the most influential individuals in the Nine Heavens. There’s hardly a sickness or injury I cannot heal, and I have treated countless people throughout the years."

"In that case, I’ll contact you if I ever get hurt." Yuan chuckled.

The Celestial Doctor nodded before falling into a brief moment of silence.

"By the way, have you met that mischievous little girl yet?" she suddenly asked.

"Mischievous little girl? Who are you talking about?" Yuan asked with his eyebrows raised.

"You know... that little girl who used to follow you everywhere. She’s one of the four Celestial Overlords in your faction."

"Oh, you mean Xu Jiaqi? Yeah, I have met her. In fact, she is convinced that I am Tian Yingzhe’s reincarnation—not that I have told her the whole truth, yet."

"Why not? Do you not trust her? You told me about your identity quite easily, even though you don’t even remember me," she said with a somewhat puzzled face.

"No, that’s not it. I met her long before I even began recalling any memories, so I am just waiting for the right time to tell her. She’s also quite busy right now with the Celestial Overlords, and I do not want to distract her. Regardless, she already knows that I am Tian Yingzhe’s reincarnation."

"But she doesn’t know you’ve retained Tian Yingzhe’s memories," the Celestial Doctor said. "Still, that’s not surprising, considering it’s almost unheard of for a reincarnator to keep the memories of their past life. Such a thing would be beyond defying the heavens."

"Anyway, as much as I’d like to keep talking about the past and catching up, I still have a job to do—and my friend’s life is at risk. Can you tell me about the leader’s condition?"

Yuan nodded and said, "Let’s catch up another time. The leader was cursed with a vicious curse that sealed her bloodline. However, that’s already being taken care of. Since I am not a real doctor, I don’t know if there’s anything else wrong with her."

"I understand. Then I will have to examine her. Let’s return."

Some time later, Yuan and the Celestial Doctor returned to the room.

"I’m going to examine the leader now," declared the Celestial Doctor.

Yuan quickly reassured the elders, "Don’t worry, it won’t affect the curse-cleansing process."

The Celestial Doctor went to examine the leader shortly later.

"She has some minor internal injuries. However, it’s nothing serious, and they will heal by themselves," she said a moment later.

"Do you know where she went before returning?" she then asked the elders.

"Well, she had some business with another Royal Phoenix Clan, but I can’t imagine they’d do something like this to her—we’ve always been on good terms. She was probably attacked on her way back or something. We won’t know for sure until she wakes up," explained one of the elders.

The Celestial Doctor then said, "In any case, since I have examined her and determined there’s nothing I can do for her, I’ll be taking my leave now."

"W-What about her weakened bloodline? Is there a fix for that?" One of the elders suddenly asked.

The Celestial Doctor responded without hesitation. "Of course, but it’s going to be very costly. I can already think of a few treasures that could restore her bloodline, but each one is incredibly rare and utterly priceless."

"That’s..."

Naturally, the elders knew of such treasures even without needing the Celestial Doctor to name them, but they were far beyond the reach of even the Rising Phoenix Clan. Even if they somehow managed to acquire these treasures, they wouldn’t dare to use them so carelessly.

"Aside from using such treasures, the only option is for her to slowly restore her bloodline over time," the Celestial Doctor said.

"That will take millions of years..."

"It’s unfortunate, but there is no shortcut."

Yuan then spoke up, "I may have a way to improve her bloodline."

"Really?!" The elders looked at him with skepticism written all over their faces, but none dared to voice their doubts.

Feng Haoyu stepped forward and said, "Have you all forgotten that he carries the Primordial Phoenix’s bloodline?"

"That’s right! Primordial Phoenixes can enhance the bloodline of other phoenixes!" the elders exclaimed, trembling with excitement as they remembered Yuan’s identity.

But before they could celebrate, Yuan’s calm voice cut in.

"Removing your leader’s curse and restoring her bloodline are two entirely different matters. I won’t ask for anything to lift the curse, but if you want me to restore her bloodline, you’ll have to do something for me in return."

"What do you want us to do?" One of the elders asked.

"We can talk about that once your leader wakes up," he said.

"Okay..."

"Then I’ll take my leave for real now. Until next time." The Celestial Doctor said to Yuan before leaving the Rising Phoenix Clan.

Three days after the Celestial Doctor’s departure, the Sacred Chalice of Purification completed its work, fully cleansing the leader’s curse. Just a few hours later, she finally awoke from her long slumber.
